case_title: VICENTE SANTA MARIA-FUENTES VS. DREAM RESTAURANTS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION WH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTA MARIA-FUENTES, VICENTE AS TO DEFENDANT DREAM RESTAURANTS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION WH ICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS MALISA  DREAMS RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
